title: What's new in v2.66.0
content:
Features:
- New fun mode: Dino companion
- JPEG export

Enhancements:
- Custom brush panel can be dragged out
- Snap to guide lines can work with isometric guide lines
- Shading can be activated from the gesture pad, joystick, and keyboard shortcuts
- Option to skip big timelapse frames to avoid failure due to big canvases
- Top-left buttons no longer overlap with the windowed mode buttons

Fixes:
- Direct indexed .aseprite saving error
- Some UI inconsistencies
